response.justification: Candidate has relevant adjacent experience — geospatial work through GISCollective (open-source GIS platform), low-latency distributed systems at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec), and some C/C++ background at National Instruments. However, modern C++ experience is over a decade old (2014-2015), there is no Rust experience, and no direct navigation/routing pipeline work. Primary recent stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. Worth a screening call to assess C++ depth and willingness to ramp, but likely not a strong match for a senior C++ routing tiling role. Note: resume header name (Wei Chen) does not match contact details (szabobogdan), which warrants clarification.
strengths: Founded and maintains GISCollective, a geospatial/GIS platform — direct domain alignment
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic with DLang and async I/O
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing-focused
concerns: Modern C++ experience is dated (last commercial C/C++ role ended in 2015) and no Rust experience listed
No navigation/routing pipeline or map tiling background
Identity inconsistency between resume name (Wei Chen) and contact email/links (szabobogdan)
